mapper.sql: id, username, password, nickname, phone, email, role, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, nickname, phone, email, role, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{role}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE user SET username = #{username}, nickname = #{nickname}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, role = #{role}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user
(username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR nickname LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
